mapper.select: SELECT * FROM private_messages WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO private_messages(id, session_id, sender_id, content, status, read_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{id}, #{sessionId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, #{status}, #{readAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE private_messages SET status = 'read', read_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM private_messages WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM private_messages WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
